source: NVIDIA Blackwell Tuning Guide 13.3 (docs.nvidia.com/cuda/blackwell-tuning-guide) + CUDA GPU Compute Capability table (developer.nvidia.com/cuda/gpus); Compute Capability 12.0. VERIFIED 2026-06-23: 48 warps/SM, 128KB smem/SM, 99KB smem/block, 64K regs/SM.

triton_caveats.note: num_stages=1 (no multistage pipelining); tune num_warps; TMA/TMEM are MMA features, N/A for GEMV/elementwise/topk
